evidence_id.description: Sequential, append-only. Never reused, even if an entry is later superseded.

publication_date.description: ISO 8601 date. Null if not yet confirmed against the primary source.

capture_date.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when DFAPTI captured this record.

source_url.description: Null only when a candidate URL has not yet been independently confirmed. Never a guessed or fabricated URL.

document_hash.description: SHA-256 of the captured source document. Null until the primary document has been fetched and hashed.

proof_of_fact.description: Human plus Evidence score, kept distinct from classification per repository Factualism convention.

superseded_by.description: Evidence ID of a later record that supersedes this one. Append-only: this field is set, the original record is never edited or deleted.

recorded_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp the entry was appended to the register.
